readouts.starTypePattern: (a main sequence star of this mass would have spectral type {{type}}, temperature {{temperature}} K, and radius {{radius}} R<sub>Sun</sub>)
(a main sequence star of this mass would have spectral type {{type}}, temperature {{temperature}} K, and radius {{radius}} R<sub>Sun</sub>)

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the radial-velocity curve above and orbit diagrams (side, earth, two-dimensional, and three-dimensional views) below.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has sliders for the planet and star masses, orbit size, eccentricity, inclination, and longitude, plus measurement, view, and animation controls, and a Reset All button.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Drag a slider or choose a system preset to see how the star's wobble changes. Use the Play button to animate the orbit.

radialVelocity.currentDetailsPattern: The system has an orbital period of {{period}} days and a radial-velocity amplitude of {{amplitude}} meters per second. The host star is a {{type}} star.

screenSummary.playArea: The play area shows the light curve above and a diagram of the planet crossing its star below.
screenSummary.controlArea: The control area has sliders for the planet and star sizes and masses, orbit size, eccentricity, inclination, and longitude, plus measurement, view, and animation controls, and a Reset All button.
screenSummary.interactionHint: Drag a slider or choose a system preset to see how the transit depth and duration change. Use the Play button to animate the orbit.

transit.currentDetailsTransitingPattern: The planet orbits every {{period}} days. Its transit blocks {{depth}} of the star's light for {{duration}} hours. The host star is a {{type}} star.
transit.currentDetailsNoTransitPattern: The planet orbits every {{period}} days and does not transit its star. The host star is a {{type}} star.
